name: Erbsenpuree (Yellow Split-Pea Puree)
recipeInstructions:
1. If needed, presoak peas according to package directions and drain well.
2. In a large pot, combine water or stock, whole onion, carrot, turnip or parsnip, marjoram, thyme, and salt.
3. Cook until peas and vegetables are tender, about 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
4. Drain well. Mash peas and vegetables in blender or press through a sieve.
5. In a small frying pan, sauté the minced onion in butter until lightly browned; blend in flour and cook for about 2 minutes.
6. Add to blended peas and vegetables. Beat until fluffy and serve hot.
